question: Which PRESENT r3 true ciphertext output bits are predictably above their majority baseline and an architecture-matched shuffled-label control on fresh plaintexts?
advance_gate: At least one discovery-selected (bit, stronger true-output model) pair passes the same AUC, accuracy-over-majority, and true-minus-shuffled AUC thresholds on 65536 fresh source-disjoint plaintexts; MLP-selected bits require a matched MLP shuffle control in OP11.
stop_gate: Do not expand rounds or full-output training when no bit fresh-confirms; audit only a dedicated single-bit head as a multitask-interference diagnostic.
next_action_on_pass: Train dedicated heads only for confirmed bits and repeat the same positions under one independent fixed secret key.
